topics.title: Tributes to Ed Bradley and Legal Name Disputes
topics.summary: The studio reflects on the passing of journalist Ed Bradley while engaging in a comedic debate over Fred Norris's legal name change.

topics.title: Identity Confusion and Carnegie Hall Performance
topics.summary: The studio explores a colleague's confusing name change on official logs before transitioning to a discussion about a successful comedy performance at Carnegie Hall.

topics.title: Artie's Dating Experiences and Dinner Details
topics.summary: The studio explores Artie's recent dates, his relationship with Dana, and the extensive amount of food he consumed during a filmed dinner at a restaurant on the Hudson River.

topics.title: Artie's Food-Centric Date
topics.summary: The studio reviews clips of Artie’s date, which centered heavily on discussions about food and various New York City restaurants.

topics.title: Riken and Lance Bass Relationship
topics.summary: The studio explores Riken's experiences in the military, his participation on The Amazing Race, and his romantic relationship with Lance Bass.

topics.title: Military Experience and Porn Film Auditions
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with a former military officer about his experiences as a gay man in the armed forces and an interview with a porn star regarding her upcoming film.

topics.title: Porn Auditions and Adult Performances
topics.summary: The studio hosts two women, Zoe and Isabella, who audition for a porn scene involving a performer known as Bigfoot.

topics.title: Adult Film Scene and Media Clips
topics.summary: The studio features a scripted adult film scene with performers, followed by various media clips including political commentary and comedy sketches.

topics.title: China Doll Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a discussion with Jonie Lauer, known as China Doll, regarding her transition from professional wrestling to pursuing music and the challenges of her career.

topics.title: Jonie Lauer Transformation Plans
topics.summary: The studio features Joni Lauer discussing her plans for plastic surgery, a potential reality show, and her transition from the "China Doll" persona to a more feminine image.

topics.title: Radio Show Commentary and Guest Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a variety of segments including discussions on celebrity appearances, listener feedback regarding satellite radio reception, the high cost of concert tickets, and updates from the news team regarding guest interactions.

topics.title: Joey's Substance Use and Career Impact
topics.summary: The studio discusses Joey's recent relapse, the removal of his webcam by sponsors due to drug use, and the challenges of overcoming addiction.

topics.title: Military Valor and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers the posthumous recognition of Corporal Jason Dunham for his bravery in Iraq, reports on celebrity legal issues involving Daniel Baldwin, medical discussions regarding uterus transplants, and various entertainment news stories.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers various topics including the legal complexities of celebrity prenuptial agreements, reports on international conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan, the death of actor Jack Palance, and a lawsuit involving the film Borat.
